title: Accessible forms asap
excerpt: Please make the Monday.com forms accessible by screen reader. My team can not use them! Accessibility is base line minimum, especially when your platform is WCAG compliant. Thank you.

posts.author: Voxer (Sam Gould)
posts.cookedHtml: Please make the Monday.com forms accessible by screen reader. My team can not use them! Accessibility is base line minimum, especially when your platform is WCAG compliant. Thank you.

posts.author: Voxer (Sam Gould)
posts.cookedHtml: Larry Berger, you asked me to tag you in this. Thanks.

posts.author: brieyost (Brie)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am also requesting accessible forms. Can we get an update on where this is on the roadmap?
Also curious if there are any folks in the community who have some advice on how they have implemented forms while they are not WCAG compliant. Thanks.

posts.author: Voxer (Sam Gould)
posts.cookedHtml: FWIW, I am using the Zapier App with Google Forms to bring content over into Monday
